creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
On Thu, Jul 29, 2010 at 02:10:43PM -0400, Tuco wrote:
> I realize I made a mistake, kernel headers can't use <stdint.h> so my
> change needs to be reverted in sys/ directory. I tested with make
> buildkernel now (in my FreeBSD chroot), and it works. Sorry!

So, should this PR be closed?

mcl
